name: gpt56-superpowers
description: A lean, outcome-first, risk-based development workflow for GPT-5.6.

interface.longDescription: An explicit, risk-based workflow that gives GPT-5.6 clear outcomes, permission boundaries, proportional validation, and stop rules without mandatory ceremony.
defaultPrompt: Use GPT-5.6 Superpowers to execute this task with proportional process and validation.
